name: Bilt Palladium Card

welcome_offer.bonus: 50,000 Bilt bonus points + Bilt Gold Status
welcome_offer.requirement: Spend $4,000 on everyday purchases in the first 90 days + $300 Bilt Cash upon approval

earning_rates.description: Up to 5X points on a choice of category (up to $25,000/year) — dining, travel, or online shopping

features: Bilt Gold Status (elevated earnings, exclusive perks)
Annual travel credit: $300 Bilt Travel portal credit
Priority Pass lounge access (for cardholder and authorized users)
Earn up to 1.33X points on rent (up to 100% of rent as points)
Rent Day perk: double points on the 1st of each month
Complimentary membership to Global Entry/TSA PreCheck (up to $120 statement credit)
